description_long: This is a stylized doll figure standing on a round pedestal base decorated with alternating red and black diamond patterns. The doll has a large head with exaggerated facial features, including a wide smile, large blue eyes, and a black mask. Its hair is blonde, styled into two high pigtails, and it wears a classic jester costume split into red and black halves with white accents and pom-poms. The costume features a white ruffled collar and matching wrist cuffs, and the doll's gloved hands are posed with one touching its face and the other extended outward. The overall appearance is playful and cartoonish, with a glossy, smooth finish and vibrant colors.
description: A cartoonish jester doll with blonde pigtails, a red and black split costume, and a diamond-patterned pedestal base. The doll has a wide smile, large blue eyes, and a playful pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's smiling face, blue eyes, black mask, and the full jester costume with both arms visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the doll's head, the pigtail, and the side split of the costume.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both pigtails, and the split color design of the costume down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the extended arm, and the side split of the costume.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic jester costume with a split red and black color scheme, white ruffled collar and cuffs, and pom-pom accents, inspired by Harley Quinn's iconic look from DC Comics.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with one arm bent and hand touching the face, the other arm extended outward, legs together, and head slightly tilted.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide open blue eyes, raised eyebrows, and a cheerful, playful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short blonde hair styled into two high pigtails with curled ends.
